de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang

Class UnparameterizedMergeContract

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.UnparameterizedMergeContract
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    MergeContract, SpecificationElement

    public class UnparameterizedMergeContract
extends java.lang.Object
implements MergeContract
    A MergeContract for UnparametricMergeProcedures like MergeByIfThenElse.
